title: Ubiquiti 2.5G passive PoE injector, 24V, 12W
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Adapter-PoE-24-12W is a high-quality 2.5Gbps passive 24V PoE injector with a maximum output power of 12W , a maximum current of 0.5A and a status LED indicator. Power is supplied over pins 4,5 (+) and 3,6,7,8 (-). It supports remote reset functionality and provides surge protection
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000/2500 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Output Power [W] 12 Pin powering 4,5 (+), 3,6,7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 24 Output Current [A] 0,5 Efficiency [%] 83
